title: Phá Lấu

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Rub the tripe thoroughly with salt and baking soda, scrubbing every fold. Rinse under cold running water. Repeat 2–3 times until there is no smell.
Bring a large pot of water to a rolling boil. Add the tripe and boil for 10 minutes. Drain and rinse again under cold water. This double-cleaning ensures the tripe is perfectly clean and tender.
Cut the cleaned tripe into bite-sized strips, about 2 inches long and ½ inch wide.
Heat oil in a heavy pot over medium heat. Sauté garlic and shallots until golden and fragrant. Add five-spice powder, star anise, cinnamon stick, and lemongrass. Stir for 1 minute.
Add the tripe strips and toss to coat in the aromatics. Pour in the soy sauce, fish sauce, and sugar. Stir well and cook for 2–3 minutes.

Pour in the coconut milk and chicken broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low. Cover and let it braise gently for 1.5–2 hours, stirring occasionally, until the tripe is very tender and the sauce is rich and creamy.
Taste and adjust seasoning — the broth should be rich, fragrant, and slightly sweet from the coconut milk, with warmth from the five-spice.
Serve hot in deep bowls with crusty French bread for dipping into the broth.

scan_label: Công thức gốc · Original handwritten recipe
